data.title: Japanese listed real estate company Open House Group announces acceptance of XRP, SOL and DOGE payments
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Japanese listed real estate company Open House Group announced that it will accept XRP, SOL and DOGE payments, supporting international customers to purchase local properties using relevant cryptocurrencies. The company has previously announced support for BTC and ETH payments and sponsored Japan's largest lightning network community "Diamond Hands" for joint research projects in 2022. (PRNewswire)

data.title: U.S. Bitcoin ETFs Acquire Significant BTC Amid Limited Miner Output
data.description: According to PANews, Bitcoin Magazine has revealed data on the X platform indicating that U.S. Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs) have collectively purchased 8,775 BTC this week. In contrast, Bitcoin miners have produced only 3,150 BTC during the same period. This disparity highlights the growing demand for Bitcoin through ETFs compared to the limited supply generated by miners.

data.title: After the launch of BNB Chain Goodwill Alliance, the average daily volume of sandwich attack transactions on BSC dropped by more than 400%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Blocksec data on March 22, after the launch of the BNB Chain Goodwill Alliance, the average daily number of sandwich attack transactions on BSC dropped by more than 400% to less than 100 per day.
The BNB Goodwill Alliance aims to coordinate off-chain actions and promote innovative ideas, best practices and ethical standards to safeguard the best interests of BNB holders and participants in the entire BNB ecosystem.

data.title: JPMorgan Chase, Wells Fargo and Bank of America Customers Holding $2,620,000,000,000 in Uninsured Deposits As Americans Pour Cash Into Unprotected Accounts
data.description:
New numbers show customers at JPMorgan Chase, Wells Fargo and Bank of America are piling money into unprotected accounts. The lenders’ quarterly Call Reports, submitted to the Federal Financial Institutions Examination Council (FFIEC), show the banks customers now collectively hold $2.62 trillion in uninsured cash.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/22/jpmorgan-chase-wells-fargo-and-bank-of-america-customers-holding-2620000000000-in-uninsured-deposits-as-americans-pour-cash-into-unprotected-accounts/

data.title: Stablecoin protocol Falcon Finance TVL exceeds $80 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official data, the TVL of the stablecoin protocol Falcon Finance exceeds 80 million US dollars and is currently reported at 88.9 million US dollars. The APY of its pledged version token sUSDF is currently reported at 22.6%.
It is reported that Falcon Finance is a synthetic US dollar stablecoin protocol launched by DWF Labs partner Andrei Grachev.

data.title: CZ replied and mentioned LUXUN
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CZ replied on the X platform: "Infinite distance, countless people, are all related to BSC. -Lu Xun" Affected by this, LUXUN rose to a new high.
According to GMGN market data, LUXUN's market value rose to 9m in a short period of time.

data.title: Ripple USD Market Cap Reaches Record High
data.description: According to PANews, the market capitalization of Ripple's stablecoin, Ripple USD (RLUSD), has surpassed $170 million, reaching an all-time high of $176,801,211, as reported by Coingecko. This milestone follows Ripple's recent announcement that the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission has officially withdrawn its four-year-long lawsuit against the company.
